response.step_by_step_log: 1. Analyzed the entire video for vocal music content. 2. Identified Anya Melfissa presenting her 2026 birthday merchandise. 3. Verified that the background music playing throughout the video is purely instrumental and does not contain any vocals or lyrics. 4. Based on the lack of vocal music, no song metadata or lyrics were retrieved. 5. Divided the video into thematic scenes based on the content of the presentation.
response.global_summary: Anya Melfissa announces her 2026 birthday merchandise set, including canvas art, a notebook, a pen case, and a situational voice pack, while also highlighting a new signed photo-style card as a purchase bonus.

scenes.description: Anya Melfissa introduces her 2026 birthday celebration, thanking her friends and mentioning her 'Detective Anya' project and special guest, Hatsune Miku.
Anya showcases the individual items of the birthday merchandise set: canvas art by Lunar, a notebook, and a pen case.
Anya explains the limited edition and standard edition purchase bonuses, including the signed photo-style card.
